response.justification: Strong software engineer with 20 years of experience and recent exposure to agentic frameworks, but lacks critical CTO requirements. No evidence of scaling engineering teams to the required 10-30+ person range, agentic AI experience limited to contributing to infrastructure rather than architecting production multi-agent systems, minimal fintech background (16 months only), and no demonstrated work operating AI systems in regulated high-stakes environments.
strengths: 20+ years software engineering experience with multiple senior-level roles across distributed systems, web, and infrastructure
Proven high-performance systems expertise: handled millions of RPS at Dunnhumby with real-time asynchronous I/O and low-latency databases
Current exposure to agentic frameworks and MCP at re:cinq, demonstrating awareness of contemporary AI infrastructure trends
concerns: No demonstrated track record of scaling and leading engineering teams to 10-30+ people; resume shows IC and contributor roles, not organizational leadership
Agentic AI experience limited to contributing to infrastructure; no evidence of designing production multi-agent systems, feedback loops, or observability infrastructure
Minimal fintech domain expertise (16 months at RIDE Capital); no demonstrated knowledge of credit systems, payment flows, regulatory compliance, or financial risk modeling
